mapper.sql: CASE WHEN t.end_date IS NOT NULL AND t.end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN t.start_date IS NOT NULL AND t.start_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'UPCOMING' WHEN t.start_date IS NOT NULL AND t.end_date IS NOT NULL AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN t.start_date AND t.end_date THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'UPCOMING' END
t.trip_id, t.title, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.user_id, t.group_id, g.group_name, t.created_at, t.updated_at, AS status
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM trips t INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = t.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} INNER JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = t.group_id
= #{status}
ORDER BY t.start_date ASC NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC, t.trip_id DESC
